title: Session 03: TodoWrite - The Power of Planning
Tracking Problems in Arch Linux
description: Arch Linux is a rolling-release distribution that prioritizes simplicity and customization. However, its "bleeding edge" nature can occasionally lead to issues that require manual intervention or specific workarounds. This article serves as a central tracker for such problems and their solutions.

title: initialization
description: Assign all parameter to a same value. It introduces symmetry during training, which may harm performance.
